videos.title: WORLD CUP ULRICEHAMN
videos.description:
First World Cup in Sweden this winter and the atmosphere was amazing. 
Please LIKE the video and SUBSCRIBE to the channel if you like my Vlogs.

Photo: Michael Claesson

music
Seashells by Scandinavianz @scandinavianz
Music provided by Free Music for Vlogs youtu.be/dx6amfs2kzQ

videos.title: Highlights| Harvey celebrates in the15km in Ulricehamn| FIS Cross Country
videos.description: Alex Harvey returns to win in World Cup after the last him victory in 2014. The Canadian skier conquers the 15km in Ulricehamn ahead of Martin Sundby, leader of world ranking, and Marcus Hellner
